Horizontal Rule Styling

1. Plain baseline (full width)

2. Width 50% (centered)

3. Width 100px (approx 100px wide)

4. Left alignment (50% wide)

5. Right alignment (50% wide)

6. Margins (20% left and right)

7. Vertical margins (2em top and bottom)

8. Class-based margins (10% left and right)

DEFERRED / not expected to work yet: Class-based width.
